Security teams are drowning in alerts while real insider risks slip through. The solution isn't just better detection. Detection matters, but judgment is what's missing: the ability to read full context, engage the right people, and turn ambiguous signals into clear decisions. That's what Axia was built to deliver.

axiasecurity.io 01 / 10
The Problem
Why Current Tools Fail

Insider Risk Is a Judgment Problem.
Your Stack Was Built for Detection.

Every category in the market was built to detect signals. None of them were built to decide what to do with them. That gap, between alert and action, is where insider incidents become insider breaches.

🚨

Legacy DLP: Too Broken to Trust

Built to match keywords and patterns. Block or alert, nothing in between. 90% false positive rate, constant maintenance cycles, and true incidents that still leak, because the tools were never built to understand context or intent.

90% false positive rate
🗺️

DSPM: A Map of Risk, Not a Response

Built to classify data at rest: what you have, where it lives, who has access. Valuable, but a fundamentally different problem. DSPM platforms have no visibility into what an employee is doing with a file right now. By the time they flag an issue, the data has already left.

Shows you where. Not why. No intent.
🔄

AI-Native DLP: Better Detection, Same Problem

A step forward in detection quality. But they still require full rip-and-replace of existing infrastructure, months of deployment, complex migrations. High risk to the organization: sensitive data leaves your environment to be analyzed externally.

Complex rip & replace. No intent. No judgment.
Every tool in the market is optimized to tell you something happened. None of them tell you what to do about it. They focus on detection and speed, but detection without understanding is just more noise. Speed to alert needs to become speed to resolution.
axiasecurity.io 02 / 10
The Axia Approach
03
How Axia Works

Understand First.
Engage Second. Enforce Last.

Axia is an AI-powered judgment layer that connects to your existing tools and understands what DLP can't. A five-stage pipeline that transforms raw signals into actionable decisions, in minutes, not months.

🔌
01 - CONNECT

API Integration

Connects to your existing DLP and to your apps like Gmail, Slack, Teams and more. Up in 3 hours.

🧠
02 - UNDERSTAND

Deep Context

Analyzes the WHO, WHAT, and WHY behind every signal, incorporating role, behavior, history, and organizational context.

⚖️
03 - JUDGE

Vertical AI

Purpose-built AI determines what is truly risky for your business, not just what matches a pattern.

💬
04 - ENGAGE

Right People

Notifies managers with full context, escalates to security when warranted. Human-confirmed.

🛡️
05 - ENFORCE

Smart Decisions

AI-analyzed decisions make your existing tools enforce smarter, with full audit trails and explainability.

The Phased Model

Start with Observability.
Earn the right to Act.

  • 👁️
    Observe First. Surface, map, and baseline semantic evasion across your crown jewels. See what's real before touching anything.
  • 💬
    Engage Next. Shift the paradigm from blocking to human-centric interaction, coaching the employee, briefing the manager, using automated and explainable context.
  • 🛡️
    Enforce Last. Reserve hard blocks as a final line of defense, applied dynamically only when the gravity of the case explicitly demands it. Never block for blocking's sake.
The Design Philosophy

Built for the Real World.

Enterprise security teams don't need another tool that creates friction. They need a partner that understands context, the employee's role, their history, their organizational moment, and makes the right call without the noise.

Axia was built on a core belief: judgment is the missing capability in the insider risk stack. Not more alerts. A system that reads the full picture and knows what to do about it.

axiasecurity.io 03 / 10
Vertical AI
04
What Makes Axia Different

Not General AI.
Vertical AI.

Every industry has a different language, different workflows, and a completely different definition of risk. General-purpose AI doesn't know the difference. Axia does.

🏦
FINANCE
🏥
HEALTHCARE
🏭
MANUFACTURING
🛡️
DEFENSE
💊
PHARMA
🧠
Vertical AI

Finance is not healthcare.
Manufacturing is not defense.

Axia is the only cybersecurity platform pre-trained to your specific industry, one that truly understands your business, its workflows, and what risk actually looks like in your world.

A trading desk anomaly means something completely different than a nurse accessing after-hours records. Axia knows the difference, before you configure a single rule.

95%+
detection accuracy
out of the box
⚙️
Organizational Tuning

Drag. Drop.
Axia learns the rest.

Simply drag and drop your organization's policies into Axia for tailored understanding. No manual classification. No guesswork. Axia reads your policies and builds a contextual risk model around them.

Contextual baselines build over time: what's normal for a role, and what is a typical pattern for a team. Every week Axia runs, it gets smarter about your organization specifically.

✓ No manual rule writing
✓ Role-based behavioral baselines
✓ Gets fine-tuned continuously after deployment
✓ Team-level pattern recognition

General AI is one size fits all. Vertical AI is what fits your company. The difference isn't a feature, it's the entire reason Axia can tell you what's actually risky in your specific business, without months of training, tuning, or configuration.

axiasecurity.io 04 / 10
Agentic Insider Risk
05
Agentic Insider Risk

Same Gate.
New Subject.

When an AI agent acts for the company, Axia judges it under the same gate as people, and agents can ask first. One verdict engine, two ways in.

🚦
Caught at the Gate

Agentic insider risk

Axia judges AI agents acting for the company as an insider-risk subject, under the same gate as people. When an agent's action crosses the line, Axia contains it the same way it contains a person.

IDENTITY
step-up or disable
on agent identities
🔌
Consumed at the Source

Judgment-as-a-service

Agents call Axia's verdict directly before they act. An agent asks "is this an insider-risk event?" and obeys the explainable verdict it gets back.

✓ Verdict on demand via API, CLI or SDK
✓ Agent asks before it acts
✓ Same engine, explainable every time

One verdict engine, two ways in: an agent gets judged at the gate, or it consumes the judgment at the source. Identity is the containment rail for a misbehaving human or AI-agent subject, the moment the verdict warrants it.

axiasecurity.io 05 / 10
Product Capabilities
What You Get

Six Capabilities.
One Decision.

Axia delivers a complete insider risk intelligence stack, from real-time posture visibility to AI-powered case investigation and human-guided enforcement. Each capability is designed to give you something the rest of the market can't: a decision.

⚡
Command

Threat Analysis Center

The case triage workbench that gives analysts the whole picture in seconds. Severity-ranked cases with AI analysis: what happened, why it matters, what to do next. Designed to replace hours of manual investigation with minutes of informed decision-making.

🔬
Case Intelligence

Three-Layer AI Analysis

Every case receives three layers of AI analysis: what happened (the event reconstruction), why it matters (the business impact analysis), and why it's unusual (the behavioral deviation scoring). Evidence preserved, chain of custody intact.

💬
Engagement

Contextual Human Engagement

Contextual manager notifications with full AI-generated briefings. Guided escalation paths that match the severity of the case. All actions human-confirmed, Axia never acts unilaterally. The right person gets the right information at the right time.

📊
Posture

Risk Posture and Connections

A board-ready risk posture score backed by explainable AI. Full visibility across your connected tools, data sources, and organizational risk surface, updated in real time. Fully explainable to executives and regulators.

🤖
Intel Advisor

Conversational Risk AI

A conversational AI trained on your organization's risk data. Ask "which employees have shown pre-departure risk patterns in the last 90 days" and get a cited, evidence-backed answer in seconds. Not a chatbot, a risk analyst that never sleeps.

🔒
Enforce

Smart Enforcement Layer

AI-analyzed decisions flow back into your existing DLP tools as precision enforcement actions. Not broad blocks, surgical interventions, applied only when the full case context justifies it. Your stack enforces smarter, without you having to rebuild it.

axiasecurity.io 07 / 10
Product - Case Intelligence
Case Intelligence

Every Case. Three-Layer AI Analysis.

Every case surfaces with a complete picture: what happened, why it matters, and why it's unusual. The source is one click away. Actions span from human engagement to smart enforcement. The full timeline shows everything from day one.

AI Analysis
Three-layer AI breakdown of every case: what happened, why it matters to the business, and why the behavior is unusual. Each layer is generated from behavioral baselines, HR context, and organizational signals, not just the DLP alert.
Source
View the exact sensitive data with one click. If the source is a document, sensitive sections are highlighted in yellow, so investigators see precisely what was exposed, not just that something was flagged.
Actions
Engagement actions: contact the employee, notify the manager, loop in HR or Legal, can run automatically or with a single click. Smart Enforcement actions feed directly back into your existing DLP stack as precision interventions.
Timeline
A complete chronological record from the first event to the last, every access, transfer, and behavioral signal in order. Gives investigators the full context of how a violation unfolded, not just where it ended.
axiasecurity.io 08 / 10
Axia vs. The Market
09
Competitive Positioning

A Different Category.
Not a Better Tool.

Axia doesn't compete with your DLP. It completes it. The comparison below shows why the market has been measuring the wrong things, and what actually matters when you're protecting intent against trust.

Dimension Legacy DLP DSPM AI-Native DLP
Detection Regex, keywords, patterns Classification at rest only Semantic AI on data in motion Semantic AI + behavioral context + intent
Context None Data sensitivity only Limited Deep: WHO + WHAT + WHY + org context
Visibility Data in motion (channels) Data at rest only Data in motion Full: data, behavior, intent
Response Block or alert only Posture recommendations Block or alert only Judgment + Engagement + Smart Enforce
Engagement None None None Manager notification, guided escalation
Deployment 6–12 months 6–12 months 6-12 months, full replacement required 3 hours, API-based, zero agents
False Positives ~90% N/A ~40% <5%
Vendor Risk Inline, disruption risk Additive layer, low risk Very High Zero: runs alongside, uninstall anytime
Explainability Rule matched, no context Classification rationale Partial, model output Full AI reasoning trace, citable evidence

The industry has been measuring insider risk tools on detection capability. Detection is not the main gap. The gap is judgment: context, engagement, and a decision the analyst can act on.

Get Started
Deployment

From Zero to First Insight.
In One Afternoon.

Axia connects through secure API integrations to your existing stack and surfaces your first real risk within days, not months.

STEP 01

Connect

API integrations to your existing DLP and echo system. Secure, read-first connections. Zero data leaves your environment.

⚡ < 3 hours
STEP 02

Baseline

Axia ingests your historical data to build behavioral baselines and crown-jewel maps. The AI understands your organization before it says a word about risk.

📊 1–3 days
STEP 03

First Cases

Your first real insider risk cases surface, with full AI analysis, severity scoring, and recommended actions. No tuning required. No false positive avalanche.

🎯 1–3 days
